# Tentra

> Tentra is a personalised revision app for future lawyers preparing for the UK SQE (Solicitors Qualifying Exam) and the New York UBE (Uniform Bar Exam) — study planner, MCQ practice, mock exams, AI coach and progress analytics for SQE1, SQE2, MBE, MEE and MPT.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Tentra's personalised revision app for SQE and NY UBE candidates, features and pricing.
- [Tentra Pro](/pro): Premium plan with mock exam forecasts, smart re-planning and deeper AI insights.
